cards.title: Coders Refusing to Work Without AI Tools
cards.body: While AI accelerates code production, researchers warn it may not improve code quality. This could create long-term problems for developers relying too heavily on AI assistance.

cards.title: Essential AI Glossary: Key Terms Explained
cards.body: The AI boom has introduced countless new terms and industry jargon. This glossary breaks down the most important vocabulary you need to understand AI discussions.

cards.title: CEOs Display AI Psychosis, Says Box Founder
cards.body: Box founder Aaron Levie warns that leaders making AI replacement decisions often don't understand actual job responsibilities. ClickUp recently laid off 22% of staff for AI agents, exemplifying this trend.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M Following Nvidia Deal
cards.body: AI chip startup Groq is securing $650 million in internal funding while pivoting from hardware to AI inference. The move reflects growing focus on optimizing AI model responses.

cards.title: Cognition: AI Coding Agents Won't Replace Humans
cards.body: Devin creator Scott Wu emphasizes that AI coding agents are designed to augment, not replace human programmers. The distinction highlights a more collaborative vision for AI development tools.

cards.title: XCENA Raises $135M on Memory Bottleneck Bet
cards.body: South Korean chip startup XCENA challenges conventional AI wisdom by arguing memory, not compute, is AI's true bottleneck. The $135 million raise validates this alternative architectural approach.

cards.title: Glean Crosses $300M Revenue on AI Cuts
cards.body: Enterprise AI search startup Glean tripled annual revenue, now highlighting budget optimization as its major selling point. The growth defies typical tech competition despite entry from major giants.

cards.title: Internet Infrastructure Rebuilt for AI Agents
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure to handle machine-generated traffic instead of human users. This shift reflects AI agents moving from experiments into production systems.

cards.title: Asana Acquires No-Code Agent Builder StackAI
cards.body: Asana is integrating StackAI into its expanding AI workflow platform. The acquisition strengthens Asana's no-code capabilities for building AI agents.

cards.title: Anthropic Raises $65B, Nears $1T Valuation
cards.body: Anthropic closed a Series H round at $965 billion post-money valuation, potentially marking its final private fundraise. An IPO could follow this massive capital injection.

cards.title: AI Tokens Emerging as Tradeable Commodity Futures
cards.body: Major exchanges are designing derivative products treating AI tokens as raw material inputs like electricity or bandwidth. This shift legitimizes AI computational outputs as financial assets.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 Model
cards.body: The new Opus model includes Dynamic Workflows, enabling coordination of multiple AI subagents. This upgrade focuses on improving multi-agent orchestration capabilities.

cards.title: Musk Disputes Anthropic-SpaceX Compute Deal Terms
cards.body: Elon Musk publicly claims SpaceX's Anthropic compute commitment is short-term and cancellable, contradicting SpaceX's S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029. The dispute highlights ongoing tensions between the companies.

cards.title: Sesame Launches iOS App for Conversational AI
cards.body: The startup from Oculus founders released its iOS app, bringing conversational AI agents to consumers with natural dialogue capabilities. The experience prioritizes human-like interactions over traditional chatbot interactions.

cards.title: Apple Plans Siri Overhaul for iOS 27
cards.body: New renders reveal Apple's AI strategy including a redesigned Siri and standalone Siri app for iOS 27. The changes position Apple to compete directly with ChatGPT and rivals.

cards.title: Coders Refusing to Work Without AI Tools
cards.body: While AI accelerates code production, researchers warn it may not improve code quality, creating long-term problems. Developers increasingly depend on AI assistance, but this could backfire if code reliability suffers.

cards.title: Essential AI Terms and Definitions Glossary
cards.body: The AI boom has flooded the tech world with new terminology and jargon. Here's a comprehensive glossary explaining the most important AI-related words and phrases you'll encounter.

cards.title: CEOs Have AI Psychosis, Says Box Founder
cards.body: Leaders deciding to replace jobs with AI often don't understand the work itself, creating what Aaron Levie calls 'AI psychosis.' ClickUp exemplified this by cutting 22% of staff for AI agents.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M, Pivots to AI Inference
cards.body: AI chipmaker Groq is securing $650 million in funding while shifting focus from hardware to AI inference optimization. The move reflects changing priorities in how AI models process and refine responses.

cards.title: Devin AI Coding Agent Shouldn't Replace Humans
cards.body: Cognition's Scott Wu, creator of the popular Devin AI coding agent, emphasizes it's designed to augment rather than replace programmers. Despite its success, the tool remains a human-centric aid.

cards.title: AI Chip Startup Bets Memory Is Real Bottleneck
cards.body: South Korean chip startup XCENA raised $135 million betting that memory, not compute power, is AI's biggest limitation. The contrarian view challenges conventional wisdom about AI infrastructure needs.

cards.title: Glean's AI Search Revenue Triples to $300M
cards.body: Enterprise AI search startup Glean tripled annual revenue by positioning itself as a cost-cutting tool amid tech industry budget constraints. The surge demonstrates growing demand for AI efficiency solutions.

cards.title: Internet Infrastructure Rebuilt for AI Agents
cards.body: AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure as AI agents move from experiments to production. The shift prioritizes machine-generated traffic over traditional human internet usage.

cards.title: Asana Acquires No-Code AI Agent Builder
cards.body: Asana purchased StackAI to expand its AI workflow automation capabilities. The acquisition integrates no-code agent building into Asana's growing suite of enterprise AI tools.

cards.title: Anthropic Raises $65B, Nears $1T Valuation
cards.body: Anthropic closed a Series H round at $965 billion post-money valuation, positioning the AI startup for an imminent IPO. The massive fundraise could be the company's final private round.

cards.title: AI Tokens Becoming Tradeable Like Commodities
cards.body: Major exchanges are developing derivative products around AI tokens, treating them as raw material inputs like oil or electricity. This signals a fundamental shift in how AI resources are valued.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 with Dynamic Workflows
cards.body: The new Opus model introduces Dynamic Workflows, enabling coordination of multiple AI subagents working in concert. This advancement enhances AI agents' ability to handle complex, multi-step tasks.

cards.title: Musk Downplays Anthropic Compute Deal Duration
cards.body: Elon Musk claims xAI's Anthropic compute agreement is short-term and cancellable, contradicting SpaceX's SEC filings showing payments through May 2029. The dispute highlights tensions over AI infrastructure deals.

cards.title: Oculus Founders' Sesame AI Launches iOS App
cards.body: Sesame's new iOS app brings conversational AI agents designed to feel more natural and human-like than traditional chatbots. The app enables more nuanced back-and-forth interactions with AI.

cards.title: Apple Redesigns Siri as Standalone AI App
cards.body: New renders reveal Apple's AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app. The changes position Apple to compete directly with ChatGPT and similar AI chatbots.

cards.title: Pope Declares Technology Is Never Neutral
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's new encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' addresses AI and emphasizes that technology carries inherent values and impacts. The statement calls on technologists and policymakers to approach AI with courage and solidarity.

cards.title: AI Jobs Hysteria Lacks Supporting Evidence
cards.body: Despite growing panic over AI's threat to white-collar jobs, there's scant evidence the technology has significantly displaced workers yet. A reality check reveals the AI jobs narrative may be overblown.

cards.title: Organizations Want AI Agents But Lack Infrastructure
cards.body: While 85% of organizations want to adopt agentic AI within three years, 76% say their current operations can't support the transition. A significant gap exists between AI ambitions and operational readiness.

cards.title: Stay on Top of Relentless AI News Cycle
cards.body: MIT Technology Review recognizes the overwhelming pace of AI developments and offers resources to help readers stay informed. Tracking AI progress requires dedicated attention to quality coverage.

cards.title: LLMs Believe False Statements Despite Warnings
cards.body: Research shows large language models continue believing false information even after explicit corrections. The finding reveals a significant limitation in how LLMs process contradictory information.

cards.title: Developer Sneaks Data-Nuking Prompt Injection
cards.body: A frustrated developer embedded a data-destructing prompt injection into code written by 'vibe coders' relying on AI. The incident exposes security vulnerabilities in AI-generated code without proper review.

cards.title: Startup Offers Free Cleaning for Robot Training
cards.body: A startup provides free home cleaning services in exchange for permission to record footage for training AI robots. The model leverages household data to develop better robotic AI systems.
